summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Pop Up e-commerce. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed (auth, products CRUD with admin guard, filters, guest order creation, admin order listing/status update, seed validation). Frontend: Home, Shop (category & size filters), ProductDetail (add-to-cart), Cart drawer, Checkout (guest order), OrderSuccess, Admin login (valid + invalid), Admin Dashboard (products CRUD, orders list, status update) all work end-to-end against the live preview URL.

design_issues.screen: Admin Dashboard product dialog & Mobile Nav Sheet
issues: Radix DialogContent missing DialogTitle/Description causes console a11y warnings. Wrap titles in VisuallyHidden or add DialogHeader/DialogDescription. Non-blocking but impacts screen-reader accessibility.

action_items: (Optional/low priority) Add DialogTitle + DialogDescription (or VisuallyHidden wrappers) to Radix DialogContent in CartDrawer/Admin product dialog/Mobile Sheet to resolve console a11y warnings.

(Optional) Admin invalid-login shows toast (sonner) but the test could not detect a `.error` class. Consider adding a data-testid on the toast for easier testing. Functional behavior is correct (backend returns 401, UI stays on login page).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 538 lines in a single file — acceptable for MVP but recommend splitting into routers/models for maintainability as endpoints grow.
CORS is set to allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=False which is fine since JWT is used in Authorization header (not cookies). Consistent with implementation.
Password hashing uses bcrypt ($2b$) via bcrypt.gensalt() — compliant.
seed_admin is idempotent and updates password if env value changed — good.
Admin endpoints properly gated via get_current_admin dependency (403 if non-admin, 401 if missing).
seed_data_creation: Created test order via guest checkout (TEST Cliente, total S/696) and admin product TEST_UI_Product via dashboard dialog. Pytest class also exercises TEST_Product_Pytest (created then deleted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints with create->GET persistence checks. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All 23 pass. Admin token fixture session-scoped. Frontend data-testids are comprehensive on pages/components (see Navbar, CartDrawer, ProductCard, Shop, ProductDetail, Checkout, OrderSuccess, admin/Login, admin/Dashboard). MongoDB DB is popup_store. Seed creates 12 products on startup and idempotently seeds the admin user.
rca of the issue: No failing issues. Two cosmetic notes: (1) Radix DialogContent missing DialogTitle/Description produces console warnings — purely a11y hint. (2) Admin invalid login error toast is rendered via sonner without an `.error` class so scraping for error text yields empty, but the 401 is correctly triggered and login does not proceed (verified via network).
